sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_union (id INT, value STRING);
SELECT (union.tag(value := union_value(id := 1))).value FROM test_union WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_union SET value = (union.tag(value := union_value(id := 2))).value WHERE id = 2;
SELECT (union.tag(value := union_value(id := 1))).value AS unioned_value FROM test_union WHERE id IN (1, 2);
